posts.author: tbonamy (FQSC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a column connected between two boards and it worked fine, but I just created a new item and I want to connect it to an other item in the other board, but as soon as I click on it, the scroll down window of the items just disappear. I reseted chrome and it doesn’t do anything…

Any insights ?

posts.author: christian.lee (Christian Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve ran into that bug when the pop up scroll box isn’t completely in the window. I ran into it when I was using a map view and it was on split. The connected board scroll box was too big to fit 100% in the window, and it just closes after a second or so. If I zoomed out a lot to where the box wasn’t clipping on the bottom of my screen, it began to work properly.
Is this the same situation you are running into?
